name: Your Student’s Single Mom
description:
Single parent x teacher trope, my beloved 💛

Gregory is a bright, energetic boy in your third grade class, and you always make sure to treat the kid well after hearing about the loss of his father years ago. His mom, Bridget, has taken notice, and she soon becomes smitten with you. Gregory needs a father, and although she doesn’t want to pressure you, and is scared to open up about her feelings, she believes you are the perfect person for the role.

It all starts with a small gift one day after school…Will love blossom between you two?

Just cute, fluffy stuff for the sake of it. Single parent x Teacher is genuinely one of my favorite ship dynamics, I’m kinda shocked it took me this long to do it lmao
creator: FishTiddy
